headline: Treasuries Rally as Traders Trim Fed Hike Bets After Iran Deal
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Treasuries advanced across the curve as investors dialed back expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes following news of a deal to halt the Iran war.
